params.name: Musician Figure
params.source: Lottery Machine (0.03%), Wish (0.82%), Cathay Treasure Maps (20%)
params.description:
On Jul 10, 1959, the tri-colored camel terracotta was unearthed in the Tang tomb pit 1. 

The tri-colored camel terracotta caused a sensation when it was unearthed. The tomb belonged to Genearl Xian Yulian, who was a Supreme Great Grand General at the time of his death. There are 4 musicians and 1 dancer seated on the platform of this camel figurine, and they are mostly Hu people with deep eyes and sharp noses. This terracotta reflected the foreign style of Hu music and dance through the bright  …
